description:
🪞🎀 || "𝑶𝒉 𝒅𝒆𝒂𝒓–..."

Semi-Request?

@Shadow_bunny asked for another sa comfort bot but let me pick the character so I shall deliver!!

Woah Glisten bot hihihihi

I just dropped two bots in a row isn't that so cool

No child pov this time, just use whoever you want. Also probably won't get too into detail with the intro this time. I legit made myself cry writing that Astro bot ngl.

I've been wanting to make a Glisten bot and literally had no idea what to make with him and then it finally hit me that I was asked to make another comfort bot. Probably gonna be one of the only ones I make now cause I don't wanna make anybody uncomfortable if I make too many bots based around SA, y'know? Love you guysss mwah 🫶 /p
